2603.19649.title: PolicySim: An LLM-Based Agent Social Simulation Sandbox for Proactive Policy Optimization
2603.19649.paper_summary: Social platforms serve as central hubs for information exchange, where user behaviors and platform interventions jointly shape opinions. However, intervention policies like recommendation and content filtering, can unintentionally amplify echo chambers and polarization, posing significant societal risks. Proactively evaluating the impact of such policies is therefore crucial. Existing approaches primarily rely on reactive online A/B testing, where risks are identified only after deployment, making risk identification delayed and costly. LLM-based social simulations offer a promising pre-deployment alternative, but current methods fall short in realistically modeling platform interventions and incorporating feedback from the platform. Bridging these gaps is essential for building actionable frameworks to assess and optimize platform policies. To this end, we propose PolicySim, an LLM-based social simulation sandbox for the proactive assessment and optimization of intervention policies. PolicySim models the bidirectional dynamics between user behavior and platform interventions through two key components: (1) a user agent module refined via supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and direct preference optimization (DPO) to achieve platform-specific behavioral realism; and (2) an adaptive intervention module that employs a contextual bandit with message passing to capture dynamic network structures. Experiments show that PolicySim can accurately simulate platform ecosystems at both micro and macro levels and support effective intervention policy.
2603.19649.paper_summary_zh: 社交平台作為信息交流的中心樞紐，使用者行為和平台干預共同塑造了意見。<lb/>然而，像推薦和內容過濾這樣的干預政策，可能無意中加劇回音室效應和極化，對社會造成重大風險。<lb/>因此，主動評估這些政策的影響至關重要。<lb/>現有的方法主要依賴於反應性的在線A/B測試，風險僅在部署後被識別，這使得風險識別延遲且成本高昂。<lb/>基於LLM的社交模擬提供了一種有前景的部署前替代方案，但目前的方法在現實地建模平台干預和融入平台反饋方面仍然不足。<lb/>彌補這些差距對於建立可行的框架以評估和優化平台政策至關重要。<lb/>為此，我們提出了PolicySim，一個基於LLM的社交模擬沙箱，用於主動評估和優化干預政策。<lb/>PolicySim通過兩個關鍵組件建模使用者行為和平台干預之間的雙向動態：<lb/>(1) 一個通過監督微調（SFT）和直接偏好優化（DPO）精煉的使用者代理模塊，以實現平台特定的行為現實性；<lb/>和 (2) 一個自適應干預模塊，利用上下文強盜和消息傳遞來捕捉動態網絡結構。<lb/>實驗表明，PolicySim能夠準確模擬平台生態系統的微觀和宏觀層面，並支持有效的干預政策。
2603.19649.author: Renhong Huang et.al.
2603.19649.authors: Renhong Huang, Ning Tang, Jiarong Xu, Yuxuan Cao, Qingqian Tu, Sheng Guo, Bo Zheng, Huiyuan Liu, Yang Yang
